about.title: About me
about.description: I'm from Colombia, I love facing challenges and contributing to meaningful projects in diverse and multicultural environments.
about.description2: Software Developer and ICT Infrastructure Implementation Technologist with experience in networking and full-stack development. I stand out for my agile mindset and my ability to create innovative solutions.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: These are some of my main technical skills, with levels of mastery that reflect my experience and constant practice in each area. I am committed to continuous learning to improve and expand my knowledge.

experience.title: Experience
experience.job1_description: Development of modern and responsive user interfaces. Optimization of web application performance and enhancement of user experience.
experience.job2_description: Installation, configuration, and maintenance of network infrastructure. Troubleshooting network issues and ensuring optimal performance.

projects.title: Projects
projects.f1_description: A comprehensive Formula 1 management system featuring team management, cars, drivers, pole positions, and 3D model integrations.
projects.sgci_description: Purchasing and Inventory Management System, a project for managing purchases, inventory, promotions, and cash flow.
projects.concert_description: A responsive website for a concert event featuring modern design, animations, and ticket booking system.
projects.hamburger_description: A restaurant website with an interactive menu, ordering system, and beautiful food presentations.
projects.liga_description: A comprehensive football league management system with team statistics and match tracking.
projects.cine_description: A web application for movie enthusiasts to search and view detailed information about movies, featuring an intuitive interface and comprehensive movie database.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Feel free to reach out. I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas or opportunities to be part of your visions.
